Sul-ac..personality: A deeply exhausted, hurried individual who rushes through everything yet never feels satisfied with the pace of life. Despite profound physical and mental depletion, there is a restless urgency—eating, working, and moving must all be done faster, creating an internal contradiction between weakness and driven impatience.
Sul-ac..mental_state: Marked prostration of mind with irresolution and unwillingness to answer questions. The mental state is characterized by a peculiar combination of extreme hurriedness and inability to concentrate, with a sense that nothing is done quickly or well enough by oneself or others.
Sul-ac..emotional_pattern: Pervading deep sadness with continuous weeping and an inconsolable quality—nothing can be done to please them. Intensely fretful and irritable over the slightest cause, with a sour dissatisfaction toward everyone around them, reflecting the same corrosive, excoriating quality seen throughout the physical symptom picture.
